sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# See what changed when clicking middle red
before_seg = last_transition.before_frame.segmentation
after_seg = current_frame.segmentation

def get_blocks(seg):
    blocks = {}
    for n in seg['nodes']:
        if n['pixels'] == 4 and n['color'] not in ('c', 'Y', 'B', 'N', 'R', 'G'):
            b = n['boundary']
            rows = [p[0] for p in b]
            cols = [p[1] for p in b]
            blocks[(min(rows), min(cols))] = n['color']
    return blocks

before = get_blocks(before_seg)
after = get_blocks(after_seg)

print("Changed blocks (middle red click):")
all_keys = set(before.keys()) | set(after.keys())
for k in sorted(all_keys):
    bc = before.get(k, '?')
    ac = after.get(k, '?')
    if bc != ac:
        print(f"  {k}: {bc} -> {ac}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
